resources.string: Ama-cache azenzakalelayo wezinhlelo zokusebenza zomphakathi. Afikeleka ngaphansi kuka-Android/data kwizinguqulo ezindala ze-Android. Ayasuswa lapho uthepha \"Sula i-cache\" ezilungiselelweni zesistimu.
Ama-cache azenzakalelayo wezinhlelo zokusebenza angasese. Ayasuswa lapho uthepha \"Sula i-cache\" ezilungiselelweni zesistimu.
Faka izinhlelo zokusebenza ezisebenza manje ezingadala ukuphazamiseka.
Faka idatha engafinyeleki ngqo kodwa engasuswa ngezilungiselelo zesistimu futhi izenzekeliswe ngensiza yokufinyelela.
Yeqa izinhlelo zokusebenza lapho inani ledatha engasetshenziswa lingaphansi komncane.
Yeqa amafayela ancane kunale minyaka emincane.
Ukuzenzelela okusekelwe ekufinyeleleni kungahluleka uma i-SD Maid ingaboni kahle isistimu yakho yokusebenza. Sebenzisa lesi silungiselelo ukuze uehlise isistimu ebonakele.
I-cache yekhodi ye-JVM. Amablokhi we-bytecode ahlanganiswe ngaphakathi kwekholdi yemvelo.
Amafayela ahlobene nezikhangiso, isib. imidiya egciniwe.
Idatha ehlobene nokubika amaphutha, isib. amalogi amaphutha noma ama-dump okuphahla.
Idatha ehlobene nokuhlunga, isib. izibalo ezigciniwe zalokho othepha kuhloelo.
Ama-cache enhloso ejwayelekile agcinwe ngaphandle kokufinyelela kwesistimu.
Izithombe ezincane zokubuka kuqala ezithombe, ividiyo nomsindo.
Izinsiza ezihlobene nemidlalo umdlalo ongalizilayisha kabusha ekuqaleni okulandelayo uma kudingeka.
Amafayela agcinwe ukuze asetshenziswe lapho kungaxhunyiwe, isib. amathayela emephu.
Amafayela asusiwe kodwa afakwe efoddeni elikhethekile ukuvumela ukubuyisela khona.
Amafayela agcinwe ama-instances e-Webview asetshenziswa ngaphakathi ezinhlelweni zokusebenza.
Ama-icon e-cache ezinqamuleli zohlelo namamenyu okwabelana.
Susa amakhophi engeziwe wezisekelo ze-WhatsApp futhi ugcine kuphela ezamuva.
Amafayela athunywe noma atholakele ezingxoxweni nasezikhathini ze-WeChat.
Amafayela emidiya agciniwe alandiwa futhi lapho ebukwa engxoxweni.
Amafayela athunywe noma atholakele ezingxoxweni ze-QQ chat.
Susa izinto ezingasetshenziswa kuzo zonke izinhlelo zokusebenza?
Ama-cache azenzakalelayo omphakathi nangasese. Awakwazi ukuwafinyelela ngqo, kodwa angasuswa ngokungangqo (isib. ngensiza yokufinyelela).
Ukusula ama-cache angatholakalayo kudinga insiza yokufinyelela ye-SD Maid, kodwa ayitholakalanga. Uma ungafuni ukuyisebenzisa: Khubaza inketho ethi \"Faka ama-cache angatholakalayo\".

plurals.name: appcleaner_delete_confirmation_message_selected_x_items
plurals.item: Susa amafayela angasetshenziswa wohlelo olukhethiwe olu-%d?
Susa amafayela angasetshenziswa wezinhlelo zokusebenza ezikhethiwe ezingu-%d?

resources.string: Isistimu sikhubazile inkinobho ethi \"Sula i-cache\" yale nhlelo. Yikhiphe ukuze usheshise ukusula i-cache.

Uhlelo lwezokuphepha lwe-HyperOS (com.miui.securitycenter) luswele imvume Yezibalo Zokusetshenziswa (GET_USAGE_STATS). Lokhu kwehlisa izici ezifana no-\"Sula Idatha\" emininingwaneni yohlelo nokususa i-cache ngokufinyelela. Nikeza imvume ukubuyisela ukusebenza okuphelele.

Misa ngamandla izinhlelo zokusebenza ngaphambi kokusula i-cache yazo. Kungasiza ukusula i-cache yezinye izinhlelo, kodwa kungabangela ukuthi izinhlelo zingasebenzi kahle futhi zidinge ukuqalwa kabusha ngezandla.
